title: Community Outreach
metaDescription: Rosehill College students make a positive difference through community outreach. Join our Student Council, Interact Club, or Community Committee.

blocks.text: Community Outreach We Get Involved to Make a Difference! At Rosehill College, we are committed to making a positive difference in our community. Through partnerships, service projects, and outreach programmes, our students develop leadership skills, empathy, and a strong sense of responsibility while creating lasting connections with the wider community. These amazing student groups at Rosehill College are making a lasting impact through their hard work, dedication, and passion. Whether you are interested in supporting causes, leading events, or working as a team, there is a place for you! Join, support, and find out more about how you can get involved. Together, we can continue to make Rosehill College a place of positive change and community spirit! The Senior Student Community Committee Group The Senior Community Committee at Rosehill College is dedicated to driving positive change by supporting both local and global causes. Through initiatives like Pink Shirt Day, the CanTeen Colour Run, and the World Vision 40-Hour Challenge, this group works tirelessly to make a meaningful impact. Our senior students are committed to fighting bullying, raising funds for cancer research, and supporting efforts to address climate change. By joining this group, you can be part of something that truly makes a difference. Interact Club The Interact Club is a mixed year level group for all students to join. They are dedicated to fundraising for charities and supporting global and local causes. Throughout the year, they organise exciting events like Valentine’s Day fundraisers, Easter chocolate sales, and the Mother’s Day bake sale, raising money for important causes such as Women’s Refuge, Foster Hope, and Breast Cancer Research. The club strengthens community connections by engaging with the Rotary Club. If you enjoy fundraising, teamwork, and giving back to the community, the Interact Club is the perfect place for you!‍ Join up by sending a dm to the groups Instagram page Rosehill College Interact Club to support impactful charities and make a difference together! ‍ Student Council The Student Council is a mixed year level group that plays an important role in bringing the Rosehill College community together. In 2024, they hosted the first-ever Rosehill College Community Gala, a successful event that united students, families, and the Papakura community. From organising events to representing your voice in school decisions, the Student Council has a major role in shaping school culture and organising key events within our school. If you are passionate about leadership and making your school experience unforgettable, consider joining the Student Council. Support the community, get involved, and help make Rosehill College an even better place by joining the student council, please contact Mrs Powell at m.powell@rosehillcollege.school.nz to learn more. Rosehill College Yearly Christmas Hamper Project Since 2024, the Community Committee has made an incredible impact through the Christmas Hamper Project, expanding its efforts to support not only Rosehill College families but also those from neighbouring schools. Following the heartwarming success of the initiative, the team, led by Business Manager Ms Carolissen, has worked tirelessly to broaden its reach. Thanks to the generous sponsorship of Life Church and the kindness of our staff, students, and families, we have already raised a significant amount of funding. This has enabled us to provide hampers for families facing hardship during the Christmas period. We are truly overwhelmed by the community’s outpouring of support. It is both inspiring and deeply appreciated, and we are grateful for every donation that makes this project possible. If you would like to be part of this wonderful effort and help brighten a family's Christmas, please consider making a donation through the year. Every contribution helps to bring joy to those in need. Donations can be made to the Rosehill College Christmas Hamper Project via internet banking: Name: Rosehill College BoardAccount: 12-3031-0837472-00Reference: Your NameCode: Christmas Thank you for your generosity and for helping us spread some Christmas cheer in our community! Our Community Supporters No items found. No items found.
Community Outreach
We Get Involved to Make a Difference!

At Rosehill College, we are committed to making a positive difference in our community. Through partnerships, service projects, and outreach programmes, our students develop leadership skills, empathy, and a strong sense of responsibility while creating lasting connections with the wider community.

These amazing student groups at Rosehill College are making a lasting impact through their hard work, dedication, and passion. Whether you are interested in supporting causes, leading events, or working as a team, there is a place for you! Join, support, and find out more about how you can get involved.
Together, we can continue to make Rosehill College a place of positive change and community spirit!
The Senior Student Community Committee Group

The Senior Community Committee at Rosehill College is dedicated to driving positive change by supporting both local and global causes. Through initiatives like Pink Shirt Day, the CanTeen Colour Run, and the World Vision 40-Hour Challenge, this group works tirelessly to make a meaningful impact.

Our senior students are committed to fighting bullying, raising funds for cancer research, and supporting efforts to address climate change. By joining this group, you can be part of something that truly makes a difference.
Interact Club

The Interact Club is a mixed year level group for all students to join. They are dedicated to fundraising for charities and supporting global and local causes. Throughout the year, they organise exciting events like Valentine’s Day fundraisers, Easter chocolate sales, and the Mother’s Day bake sale, raising money for important causes such as Women’s Refuge, Foster Hope, and Breast Cancer Research.
The club strengthens community connections by engaging with the Rotary Club. If you enjoy fundraising, teamwork, and giving back to the community, the Interact Club is the perfect place for you!‍
Join up by sending a dm to the groups Instagram page Rosehill College Interact Club to support impactful charities and make a difference together!
Student Council

The Student Council is a mixed year level group that plays an important role in bringing the Rosehill College community together. In 2024, they hosted the first-ever Rosehill College Community Gala, a successful event that united students, families, and the Papakura community. From organising events to representing your voice in school decisions, the Student Council has a major role in shaping school culture and organising key events within our school.
If you are passionate about leadership and making your school experience unforgettable, consider joining the Student Council.
Support the community, get involved, and help make Rosehill College an even better place by joining the student council, please contact Mrs Powell at m.powell@rosehillcollege.school.nz to learn more.
Rosehill College Yearly Christmas Hamper Project

Since 2024, the Community Committee has made an incredible impact through the Christmas Hamper Project, expanding its efforts to support not only Rosehill College families but also those from neighbouring schools. Following the heartwarming success of the initiative, the team, led by Business Manager Ms Carolissen, has worked tirelessly to broaden its reach.

Thanks to the generous sponsorship of Life Church and the kindness of our staff, students, and families, we have already raised a significant amount of funding. This has enabled us to provide hampers for families facing hardship during the Christmas period. We are truly overwhelmed by the community’s outpouring of support. It is both inspiring and deeply appreciated, and we are grateful for every donation that makes this project possible.

If you would like to be part of this wonderful effort and help brighten a family's Christmas, please consider making a donation through the year. Every contribution helps to bring joy to those in need.
Donations can be made to the Rosehill College Christmas Hamper Project via internet banking:
Name: Rosehill College BoardAccount: 12-3031-0837472-00Reference: Your NameCode: Christmas
Thank you for your generosity and for helping us spread some Christmas cheer in our community!
Our Community Supporters
